name: Kickoff Announcement
description: Real-time kickoff notification posted at the exact moment the match begins. Short, punchy, and high-energy to engage fans following live.
guidelines: Use a short looping video (3-5 seconds) of the stadium atmosphere or crowd. The whistle icon should animate in. Keep text minimal and impactful. The energy must be electric. Suitable for Stories and Reels auto-posting at kickoff.
